notes: Mid-market industrial manufacturer of precision components for aerospace, automotive and medical devices. Multi-plant, multi-region. Generic illustrative twin.

segments.name: Aerospace components
segments.description: Engine and structural components for commercial and defense aerospace

segments.name: Automotive precision parts
segments.description: ICE and EV powertrain components for OEMs

segments.name: Industrial OEM
segments.description: Heavy machinery and energy sector parts

competitors.name: Continental AG (Automotive)
competitors.notes: Much larger in automotive; pressures our pricing

competitors.name: Local Chinese suppliers
competitors.notes: Cost-competitive at low end; pushing into mid range

prior_transformations.name: ERP consolidation (Oracle to SAP)
prior_transformations.description: Unify ERP across 12 plants from 3 different systems
prior_transformations.learnings: Plant-by-plant rollout took 4 years vs 2 planned; data migration painful

prior_transformations.name: Industrial IoT pilot (CNC monitoring)
prior_transformations.description: Real-time monitoring of CNC machines for OEE improvement
prior_transformations.learnings: Easy ROI; ~6% OEE uplift; rolled out to all plants by 2023

prior_transformations.name: EV powertrain capability acquisition
prior_transformations.description: Acquired EV motor specialist for $400M to pivot automotive segment
prior_transformations.learnings: Integration ongoing; EV unit margin lower than ICE

strategic_priorities: EV pivot in automotive segment without losing ICE revenue
Reshoring / China+1 customer demand for non-China sourcing
Predictive maintenance to reduce unplanned downtime
ESG reporting for European OEM customers
pain_points: Auto segment margin compression from EV transition
Aerospace customer concentration (Boeing + Airbus = 60% of segment)
Long aerospace certification cycles slow product innovation
